requirement_topic.en: OCPP / EMC — Network Integration and IEC 61000 Evidence

summary.en: For Paraguay public, fleet, or commercial EV charging projects, networked chargers should be prepared for OCPP back-office integration when required by the charge-point operator, fleet owner, payment platform, or public tender. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared in IEC terms acceptable to INTN, ANDE, importers, and project owners. The IEC 61000 series supplies common test methods and limits for emissions, immunity, harmonic current, voltage fluctuation, and flicker. Paraguay-specific EV charger OCPP or EMC rules were not confirmed as a separate official regime as of the dataset date, so the binding requirements are likely to come from ANDE connection review, project specifications, and owner or CPO platform requirements.
summary.zh: 对于巴拉圭公共、车队或商业电动汽车充电项目，联网充电桩在充电点运营商、车队业主、支付平台或公共招标要求时，应准备OCPP后台集成能力。EMC和电能质量证据应以INTN、ANDE、进口商及项目业主可接受的IEC术语准备。IEC 61000系列提供发射、抗扰度、谐波电流、电压波动和闪烁的常用测试方法及限值。截至本数据集日期，未确认巴拉圭存在单独官方EV充电桩OCPP或EMC制度，因此具有约束力的要求很可能来自ANDE接入审查、项目规范及业主或充电点运营商平台要求。
summary.zht: 對於巴拉圭公共、車隊或商業電動汽車充電項目，聯網充電樁在充電點運營商、車隊業主、支付平台或公共招標要求時，應準備OCPP後台集成能力。EMC和電能質量證據應以INTN、ANDE、進口商及項目業主可接受的IEC術語準備。IEC 61000系列提供發射、抗擾度、諧波電流、電壓波動和閃爍的常用測試方法及限值。截至本數據集日期，未確認巴拉圭存在單獨官方EV充電樁OCPP或EMC制度，因此具有約束力的要求很可能來自ANDE接入審查、項目規範及業主或充電點運營商平台要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — project or CPO back-office communication requirement where specified
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, emissions, immunity, harmonics, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging where CCS2 DC is used
ANDE and project-owner requirements for power quality, monitoring, metering and site activation

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. China back-office protocols may be proprietary or OCPP-based depending on the operator, but a domestic implementation does not automatically satisfy a Paraguay CPO or fleet platform. Chinese EMC reports may reference GB/T or IEC 61000-family methods, but must be checked for model, power rating, grid voltage, frequency, enclosure, cable, and firmware configuration coverage.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间。中国后台协议根据运营商可能为私有协议或基于OCPP，但国内实现并不自动满足巴拉圭充电点运营商或车队平台要求。中国EMC报告可能引用GB/T或IEC 61000系列方法，但必须检查其是否覆盖型号、功率等级、电网电压、频率、外壳、电缆和固件配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間。中國後台協議根據運營商可能為私有協議或基於OCPP，但國內實現並不自動滿足巴拉圭充電點運營商或車隊平台要求。中國EMC報告可能引用GB/T或IEC 61000系列方法，但必須檢查其是否覆蓋型號、功率等級、電網電壓、頻率、外殼、電纜和韌體配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China domestic EMC test reports using GB/T and IEC 61000-family methods where applicable

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, security profile, payment or RFID requirements, SIM or network connectivity, remote diagnostics, firmware update process, and site-activation tests required by the Paraguay CPO or owner. EMC files should include IEC 61000 cross-references, harmonic and flicker data, immunity and emission reports, cable configuration, and evidence that testing covers the exact Paraguay model. GB/T 27930 DC vehicle communication is not a substitute for OCPP back-office integration or CCS2 DC communication where those are specified.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认巴拉圭充电点运营商或业主要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、支付或RFID要求、SIM或网络连接、远程诊断、固件升级流程及站点激活测试。EMC文件应包括IEC 61000交叉引用、谐波和闪烁数据、抗扰度和发射报告、电缆配置，以及测试覆盖确切巴拉圭型号的证据。在规定OCPP后台集成或CCS2直流通信时，GB/T 27930直流车辆通信不能替代这些要求。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認巴拉圭充電點運營商或業主要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、支付或RFID要求、SIM或網絡連接、遠程診斷、韌體升級流程及站點激活測試。EMC文件應包括IEC 61000交叉引用、諧波和閃爍數據、抗擾度和發射報告、電纜配置，以及測試覆蓋確切巴拉圭型號的證據。在規定OCPP後台集成或CCS2直流通訊時，GB/T 27930直流車輛通訊不能替代這些要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory wherever ANDE, INTN route, CPO, fleet, payment platform, tender, or owner specification requires OCPP integration or IEC 61000 EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; China domestic EMC and platform evidence is not automatically accepted for Paraguay

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Networked Paraguay chargers need project-confirmed OCPP and platform integration, plus IEC 61000-style EMC and power-quality evidence where requested. A China domestic GB/T 27930 or proprietary platform file does not by itself satisfy Paraguay CPO, owner, or ANDE expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拉圭联网充电桩需要按项目确认OCPP和平台集成，并在要求时提供IEC 61000体系EMC及电能质量证据。中国国内GB/T 27930或私有平台文件本身不能满足巴拉圭充电点运营商、业主或ANDE预期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拉圭聯網充電樁需要按項目確認OCPP和平台集成，並在要求時提供IEC 61000體系EMC及電能質量證據。中國國內GB/T 27930或私有平台文件本身不能滿足巴拉圭充電點運營商、業主或ANDE預期。
